title: paysonia grandiflora
intro: Paysonia grandiflora, also known as Cliff Money Plant, is a perennial plant species native to the Appalachian Mountains in eastern North America. It is a member of the Brassicaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have antimicrobial properties. Paysonia grandiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
